opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Looking for a sales partner – 30% commission on every closed deal (n8n automation agency)

Hey I run Orbixtech (orbixtech.uk), a UK-registered automation agency. We build custom n8n workflows for small-to-mid-sized businesses – things like lead enrichment pipelines, cold email systems, CRM automation, invoice processing, you name it. We're looking for one or two sales partners who can bring us leads. opportunities.title: Senior Associate, Finance & Strategy, Marketplace
opportunities.description:
About Wolt

At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we're building the delivery of (almost) everything and you'll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
